mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS room_id, r.house_id AS house_id, cm.name AS community_name, h.house_code, h.house_name AS house_name, h.property_fee AS property_fee, h.door_number AS door_number, h.community_id, h.building, h.unit, h.floor, h.lease_mode, h.lease_mode_id, h.rental_type, h.dept_id, d.name AS dept_name, r.room_number, r.floor, r.price, r.tags, r.facilities, r.image_list, r.video_list, r.occupancy_status, r.locked, r.closed, r.area, r.direction, r.available_date, r.vacancy_start_time, h.salesman_id, u.nickname, u.phone, hl.id AS layout_id, hl.layout_name AS layout_name, hl.bedroom, hl.living_room, hl.bathroom, hl.kitchen FROM room r LEFT JOIN house h ON r.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN house_layout hl ON h.house_layout_id = hl.id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = h.salesman_id LEFT JOIN dept d ON d.id = h.dept_id LEFT JOIN community cm ON h.community_id = cm.id where r.deleted = 0
order by r.id desc

SELECT occupancy_status, count(occupancy_status) AS total FROM room r LEFT JOIN house h ON r.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = h.salesman_id where r.deleted = 0
group by occupancy_status

if.test: query.locked == null and query.closed == null and query.occupancyStatus != null

sql.if: and r.vacancy_start_time is not null and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(r.vacancy_start_time)) >= #{query.vacancyDaysMin,jdbcType=INTEGER}
and r.vacancy_start_time is not null and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(r.vacancy_start_time)) <= #{query.vacancyDaysMax,jdbcType=INTEGER}

mapper.select:
SELECT h.lease_mode_id, h.building, h.unit, h.floor, COUNT(*) AS roomCount, SUM(IF(r.occupancy_status = 1, 1, 0)) AS leasedCount, ROUND(SUM(IF(r.occupancy_status = 1, 1, 0)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS occupancyRate FROM room r LEFT JOIN house h ON r.house_id = h.id WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY h.lease_mode_id, h.building, h.unit, h.floor ORDER BY h.lease_mode_id DESC, h.building ASC, h.unit ASC, h.floor ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room r LEFT JOIN house h ON r.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = h.salesman_id WHERE r.locked = 1 AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room r LEFT JOIN house h ON r.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = h.salesman_id WHERE r.closed = 1 AND r.deleted = 0
